features.description: Agent(type) deny rules and Agent(x,y) allowed-types restrictions now enforced for named subagent spawns.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `Agent(type)` deny rules and `Agent(x,y)` allowed-types restrictions not being enforced for named subagent spawns

features.description: --tools no longer permits feature-gated tools to slip through before flags load on cold first launch.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `--tools` allowing feature-gated tools to slip through before flags loaded on a cold first launch

features.description: Chrome tab-group isolation now applies even when in-product permissions gate is off for concurrent CLI sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Chrome tab-group isolation not applying when the in-product permissions gate is off for concurrent CLI sessions

features.description: ! bash commands now auto-trigger Claude responses; set respondToBashCommands:false to preserve old context-only behavior
features.reference_changelog_line: `!` bash commands now trigger Claude to respond to the output automatically; set `"respondToBashCommands": false` in settings.json to keep the previous context-only behavior

features.description: Background subagents surface permission prompts in main session instead of auto-denying; Esc denies just that tool.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed background subagents to surface permission prompts in the main session instead of auto-denying; the dialog shows which agent is asking, and Esc denies just that tool

features.description: /review <pr> now uses the same review engine as /code-review medium.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed `/review <pr>` to use the same review engine as `/code-review medium`

features.description: CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_RETRIES now capped at 15; use CLAUDE_CODE_RETRY_WATCHDOG for unattended sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: Changed `CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_RETRIES` to cap at 15; for unattended sessions, use `CLAUDE_CODE_RETRY_WATCHDOG` instead

features.description: Workflow agent({schema}) subagents now abort after 5 schema validation failures instead of looping forever.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Workflow `agent({schema})` subagents looping forever on repeated schema validation failures instead of aborting after 5 attempts

features.description: New claude mcp login/logout CLI commands authenticate MCP servers without the interactive /mcp menu; supports --no-brows
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `claude mcp login <name>` and `claude mcp logout <name>` to authenticate MCP servers from the CLI without opening the interactive `/mcp` menu, with `--no-browser` stdin redirect support for completing over SSH

features.description: Press f to filter by status in the /workflows agent detail view.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added status filtering (press `f`) to the `/workflows` agent detail view

features.description: /login now offers a Claude Platform on AWS refresh credentials option when awsAuthRefresh is configured.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added "Claude Platform on AWS - refresh credentials" option to `/login` when `awsAuthRefresh` is configured

features.description: New teammateMode:iterm2 setting with warning when auto mode cannot find the it2 CLI.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `teammateMode: "iterm2"` setting with a warning when auto mode cannot find the `it2` CLI

features.description: /plugin Installed tab now shows a Skills section.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a "Skills" section to the `/plugin` Installed tab

features.description: Skill frontmatter keys display-name, default-enabled, fallback, metadata.* now accept kebab/snake/camelCase.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved skill frontmatter: `display-name`, `default-enabled`, `fallback`, and `metadata.*` keys now accept kebab-case, snake_case, and camelCase

features.description: Malformed SKILL.md YAML frontmatter now loads the skill body with empty metadata instead of failing silently.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved malformed `SKILL.md` YAML frontmatter handling: loads the skill body with empty metadata instead of failing silently

features.description: Teammates spawned via tmux/pane backends now inherit the leader's --effort level.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed agent teams: teammates spawned via tmux/pane backends now inherit the leader's `--effort` level

features.description: Agent now reminded to compact MEMORY.md index when nearing the size limit.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved memory: the agent is now reminded to compact its `MEMORY.md` index when nearing the size limit
